name: Deekshith Gopidi

Leveraged Spark APIs on Hadoop YARN to process high-volume datasets stored in Hive, improving efficiency of distributed data processing workflows

Designed and implemented real-time data pipelines using Kafka, Spark Streaming, and CDC patterns, enabling near real-time data availability
Built streaming ingestion pipelines integrating Kafka and Apache Storm, supporting high-throughput data ingestion into HDFS
Developed Spark Streaming applications to process continuous Kafka streams and persist results into low-latency NoSQL systems such as HBase and Cassandra
Engineered scalable data pipelines integrating cloud storage systems and modern data warehouses (BigQuery, Snowflake) for advanced analytics
Executed complex Hive queries on optimized Parquet datasets, improving query performance for reporting and analytics workloads

Improved pipeline resilience by implementing robust error handling, retry mechanisms, and fault-tolerant processing strategies
